messages.content:
proofread, edit and improve the style of the excerpt of my sci-fi fantasy novel:
Later, I myself, and some volunteers of the police force
together eradicate the outlaws and disable their illegal
operations in the summer solar system. When some of our
forces are killed, they are martyred by the goddess Diana
and upgraded to superior solar systems. Conversely, some
of these outlaws are killed or injured, punished. And they
are sent to the underworld or the hell of the first world.
Elections are held safely and soundly.
The Moderates party wins the elections successfully.
The previous overlord gets elected as the lord of the summer
solar system again. And this time through the votes of the
people and their wishes, not because he was loyal to
Princess Pary and me.

Later, I personally led a team of volunteers from the police force to effectively eradicate the outlaws and dismantle their illegal operations within the summer solar system. Tragically, some of our brave forces lost their lives in the line of duty, being immortalized as martyrs by the benevolent goddess Diana and transferred to superior solar systems. On the other hand, the outlaws who were either killed or injured faced just retribution, banished to the dark underworld or the treacherous depths of the first world.

During this tumultuous period, elections were conducted smoothly and securely. Ultimately, the Moderates party emerged victorious, achieving a resounding triumph in the electoral process. Remarkably, the former overlord, who had once held power through his allegiance to Princess Pary and myself, was elected as the lord of the summer solar system once more. However, this time, his ascent to power was a result of the genuine support and desires of the people, rather than mere loyalty to the two of us.

Through a formal ceremony, the elected overlord,
mayors, and judges at the presence of Princess Pary take an
oath to stay loyal to the laws of the summer solar system.
And after the official ceremony, a glorious celebration
begins, hoping for a better life and happiness for all.
Meanwhile, Diana’s personal spacecraft arrives and the
messenger informs the Princess her husband and newly
elected lord of my speedy return to the spring solar system,
at Diana’s behest.
All of a sudden, the crowd notices of my departure and
desperately tries to prevent me from leaving them. The
Princess and her husband try to calm people down. I am
impressed strongly by their affections and say, “Farewell,
my friends,” and then I leave the summer solar system.

In a solemn ceremony, the newly elected overlord, along with mayors and judges, pledged their unwavering loyalty to the laws of the summer solar system in the presence of Princess Pary. This oath served as a symbol of their commitment to upholding justice and order within their realm. As soon as the official proceedings concluded, a jubilant celebration ensued, filled with hope and anticipation for a prosperous future and collective happiness.

Amidst the festivities, a magnificent spacecraft belonging to Diana, the revered goddess, gracefully descended. A messenger delivered the news to Princess Pary that her husband, the newly elected lord, urgently needed to return to the spring solar system at Diana's request. Suddenly, the crowd became aware of my impending departure and urgently sought to impede my exit. Princess Pary and her husband made valiant efforts to pacify the gathering, attempting to assuage their concerns. Witnessing their genuine affection and support deeply moved me, and so I expressed my farewell, saying, "Farewell, my friends," before departing from the summer solar system.
farewell has been repeated in the last sentence

In response to the sudden revelation of my departure, the crowd, filled with desperation, made frantic attempts to prevent me from leaving their midst. Princess Pary and her husband, in a valiant effort, worked tirelessly to calm the people, assuring them that all would be well. Their display of affection and concern profoundly touched me, and with a heavy heart, I bid my farewell to those gathered, uttering, "Goodbye, my friends," as I embarked on my journey away from the summer solar system.

When the spaceship lands on the proximity of the castle
in the spring planet, I am immediately going to the Diana’s
presence to report my duties.
Surprisingly, I encounter a scene where Gabriel is
sitting on Diana’s sofa, and Diana and Omega are standing
on his sides respectfully.
I am embarrassed. It is just like that is the first time I
encounter with Holy Gabriel. Gabriel notices my confusion
and for helping me to come back to myself says in a friendly
tone, and just like the old -times, “How are you, John? I
have heard you gone through your training and missions
successfully.”

As the spaceship touched down near the castle in the spring planet, I wasted no time in making my way to Diana's presence to fulfill my duty and report the outcome of my endeavors. To my astonishment, a peculiar scene awaited me: Gabriel, the esteemed Holy Being, was seated on Diana's sofa, with Diana and Omega flanking him respectfully.

Caught off guard by this unexpected sight, I couldn't help but feel a sense of unease. It was as if encountering Gabriel for the first time all over again. Sensing my disconcertment, Gabriel, ever the understanding soul, endeavored to put me at ease with his familiar and friendly tone, remarking, "How are you, John? I've heard of your successful training and missions."

Now I gain my confidence and say, “I am fine, as you
have assigned the best trainer and master for me.” The
goddess Diana and Omega express their gratitude for me
being so polite and humble.
Then Gabriel says, “Well, we all have to fly over to the
central planet of the fourth universe to get at the presence
of Jesus.”
A luxurious spaceship is waiting for us outside the
castle.
During our travel, I ask Omega if she knows anything
about the reason that Jesus has called us in.

Regaining my composure, I confidently replied, "I am well, thanks to the guidance and mentorship of the exceptional trainer and master you assigned to me." The goddess Diana and Omega extended their gratitude for my polite and humble demeanor, acknowledging their appreciation.

Gabriel then interjected, "We must all embark on a journey to the central planet of the fourth universe to be in the presence of Jesus." Outside the castle, an opulent spaceship awaited our arrival, ready to whisk us away.

During the course of our travel, curiosity got the better of me, and I turned to Omega, inquiring if she had any insight into the reason behind Jesus summoning us.

Omega says, “I don’t know, but I have a good feeling
about it and think there might be good news for all of us.”
Gabriel turns his face back to me and says, “As you
might already have noticed, there are billions of galaxies in
the fourth universe. Some of them are more advanced than
the four seasons galaxy, and some not. However, I wanted
you to be trained there under the supervision of Diana,
because of two reasons:
1. I believe in Diana’s moderate methodology of
managing her kingdom.
2. Four entirely different climates and conditions of
the solar systems of the four seasons galaxy are the
best examples of knowing the diversity and nature
of people living in different environments.”

Omega responded, her voice filled with optimism, "I cannot say for certain, but I have a strong intuition that there may be positive news awaiting us all."

Meanwhile, Gabriel turned towards me once again, his gaze steady. "As you may have already observed," he began, "the fourth universe is home to billions of galaxies, each with its own level of advancement. Some exceed the four seasons galaxy, while others lag behind. However, I specifically chose for you to undergo training under Diana's guidance for two significant reasons."

Gabriel paused briefly, allowing his words to settle before continuing. "Firstly, I place my trust in Diana's moderate and balanced approach to ruling her kingdom. Her methodology has proven effective and fair. Secondly, the diverse climates and conditions within the four solar systems of the four seasons galaxy serve as invaluable examples of the vast range of environments and people. By experiencing such diversity, you will gain a profound understanding of the nature of individuals living in different worlds."

I have not lived long in other systems (Autumn and
Winter solar systems) of the four-season galaxy so long. But
I comprehend the concept of what Gabriel is talking about
it.
After a while, we reach to the glowing central planet of
the fourth universe. And our spaceship lands at the
proximity of Jesus’s mountainous castle. It is the first time
for Omega visiting the central planet of the fourth universe.

Though my time in the Autumn and Winter solar systems of the four-season galaxy has been relatively short, I grasp the essence of Gabriel's message. The notion of diverse environments and the people who inhabit them resonates with me.

After a while, our journey brings us to the resplendent central planet of the fourth universe. The spaceship gracefully descends near Jesus's majestic castle, situated amidst the magnificent mountains. It dawns on me that this is Omega's inaugural visit to the central planet of the fourth universe, adding an air of anticipation to our arrival.

Then we walk toward the mountainous castle of Jesus,
where the giant black pole from its top reaching infinity and
from the other end goes through the first universe, and
beyond. The radiating mesmerizing light of the pole dazzles
Omega so much that she cannot move, hear or talk for a
while. Diana quietly asks Omega to bow, and respect, we
are in the presence of the Almighty, God. The pole is what
all the seven universes are orbiting around him. He is the
only one who is dominating whatever exists, but a few know
this fact and about him. And every god or goddess is leaning
upon God’s support to rule his or her dominance.

We proceed towards Jesus's mountainous castle, drawn towards the sight of a colossal black pole soaring from its pinnacle and seemingly stretching into infinity. Astonishingly, the pole extends beyond the realms of the first universe, captivating our senses with its radiant and mesmerizing light. The sheer magnitude of the pole leaves Omega in a state of awe, momentarily rendered speechless and motionless.

Diana, sensing Omega's reverence and overwhelmed state, gently encourages her to bow in respect. We stand in the presence of the Almighty, God Himself. The pole represents the axis around which all seven universes revolve, a testament to God's dominion over all existence. It is a truth known to only a select few, while countless deities, including gods and goddesses, rely upon God's divine support to uphold their own realms of influence.

Then the high gates open, and we get in a small
spaceship and enter into the high castle. And as our ship
goes forward, a new tunnel is dug up in the front by a herd
of colorful insects and filled up again from the behind by
another colony of colourful insects that are radiating like
jewels. We reach to the presence of Jesus finally.

With the opening of the towering gates, we step inside and board a small spaceship that awaits us. Gradually, our ship glides forward, accompanied by the remarkable sight of a tunnel being carved out in real-time by a swarm of vibrant, multi-colored insects. These radiant creatures, resembling precious jewels in their luminosity, work meticulously to create a path for us. Simultaneously, another colony of equally resplendent insects fills in the tunnel behind us, as if repairing and restoring it to its original form.

Finally, our journey takes us to the sublime presence of Jesus, as we arrive at our destination.

After paying respect, Jesus stands up gently from where
he was sitting on the sofa and leaning on the black pole. The
ethereal physique of Jesus seems so broad and high that I
find myself as like a particle standing in front of him.
Then Jesus says with his dominant tone, “John, because
of your success in the trainings, and accomplishing your
missions with high efficiency and honesty, I grant you the
title, the Knight of the Fourth Universe.” Then a dazzling
white beam embraces me and starts sparkling.

As we respectfully bow before Jesus, he rises gracefully from his seat, supported by the majestic black pole. His ethereal presence radiates a breadth and height that dwarf my own figure, leaving me feeling infinitesimal in comparison.

With authority resonating in his voice, Jesus addresses me directly, acknowledging my achievements in training and the unwavering dedication I displayed in fulfilling my missions. In recognition of these accomplishments, he bestows upon me the honorable title of the Knight of the Fourth Universe. A blinding, pure white beam envelops me, permeating my being with a dazzling display of shimmering brilliance.

“Omega, because of your braveries, ascending to the
fifth universe is your privilege.” Then a yellow beam
embraces Omega and starts sparkling.
Then a blue beam embraces Diana, and Jesus says, “I
am always on your side to help you.”
Then his holiness, Jesus, sits on his sofa says to Gabriel,
“Well, my friend of what you have entrusted to us, you can
take it back, and take John back to the first universe. He
must fulfill the mission that God Almighty has granted him.
And, by the way, when he goes to the first world, like
others, he will not suffer from oblivion and will not forget
what he has experienced here.”

"Omega," Jesus acknowledges, "your remarkable displays of bravery have earned you the privilege of ascending to the fifth universe." In response, a vibrant yellow beam envelops Omega, effervescent with its sparkling radiance.

Subsequently, a soothing blue beam surrounds Diana, while Jesus assures her, "I will always be by your side, offering my assistance whenever you may require it."

Jesus, assuming his seat upon the sofa, turns his attention towards Gabriel. With a sense of finality in his words, he addresses him, "My friend, you may retrieve what you had entrusted to us. John must return to the first universe to fulfill the mission bestowed upon him by God Almighty. And rest assured, when he goes back to the first world, like the others, he will not suffer from oblivion and will retain the memories of his experiences here."

Chapter Four
John Is Back to Earth –
The First Universe

Chapter Four: John Returns to Earth - The First Universe

The familiar sights and sounds of Earth welcomed John as he returned from his extraordinary journey through the seven universes. Although the transition from the captivating realms he had witnessed was jarring, he felt a deep sense of purpose and determination as he embarked on his mission in the first universe.

Upon his arrival, John noticed that the world he returned to had changed in his absence. Advancements in technology and society fascinated him, and he found himself caught between nostalgia for the extraordinary beings he had encountered and the thrill of rediscovering his home planet.

As he delved into his mission, John realized that his experiences in other universes had endowed him with unique knowledge and insights. He sought to apply this newfound wisdom to navigate the challenges he faced, and his encounters with divine beings served as a constant source of inspiration.

As he strove to fulfill the mission granted to him by God Almighty, John was determined to make a positive and lasting impact on Earth. With the memories of his extraordinary journey firmly etched into his consciousness, he embraced his role as the Knight of the Fourth Universe, utilizing his newly acquired abilities and understanding to bring about meaningful change.

In this new chapter, John's experiences in other universes became a wellspring of strength, propelling him forward on his quest to create a better world. As he interacted with the people and faced the trials of the first universe, he remained resolute in his purpose and deeply grateful for the remarkable journey that had shaped him.

develop this paragraph and make the scenery more majestic: With the opening of the towering gates, we step inside and board a small spaceship that awaits us. Gradually, our ship glides forward, accompanied by the remarkable sight of a tunnel being carved out in real-time by a swarm of vibrant, multi-colored insects. These radiant creatures, resembling precious jewels in their luminosity, work meticulously to create a path for us. Simultaneously, another colony of equally resplendent insects fills in the tunnel behind us, as if repairing and restoring it to its original form.

As the towering gates swung open, revealing a majestic passage, we eagerly ventured forth into the awaiting marvels of the central planet. A vessel designed with sublime craftsmanship awaited our arrival, its sleek form beckoning us on board. With hearts full of wonder, we embarked on our voyage, guided by the vessel's smooth glide through the vastness of this enigmatic realm.

As our spaceship ventured deeper into this otherworldly domain, a sight of unimaginable grandeur unveiled itself before our eyes. A tapestry of vibrant, multi-colored insects, adorned with hues so vivid they rivaled the most precious gemstones, took flight in unison. With a symphony of ethereal hums, they began to sculpt a sublime tunnel, their delicate wings caressing the very fabric of reality.

Each meticulous movement was an act of creation, as this awe-inspiring swarm crafted a path for our passage. The kaleidoscope of their shimmering bodies radiated a luminosity that seemed to transcend mere mortal comprehension. The air became alive with their graceful dance, their collective artistry weaving an entrancing tapestry of iridescent hues.

In perfect harmony, a secondary colony, equally resplendent in their iridescence, followed behind, ensuring that their wondrous creation remained whole and vibrant. Their touch, like that of skilled artisans, mended and restored the passage as we advanced, leaving no trace of our presence behind.

As we traversed through this breathtaking display of nature's majesty, we couldn't help but feel a profound sense of gratitude and privilege. Our hearts swelled with appreciation for the sheer beauty and intricate craftsmanship unfolding before us. It was as if we were being granted a glimpse into a realm where dreams and reality converged in harmonious splendor.
